overview.tagline: A quiet, upscale enclave with top schools and pastoral charm
overview.description: Demarest is a small, affluent borough in the Northern Valley section of Bergen County. With a population of approximately 5,000 on just over two square miles, Demarest offers a semi-rural atmosphere with large lots, mature trees, and a peaceful residential character. The borough is home to Northern Valley Regional High School at Demarest, one of Bergen County's premier public high schools. Demarest attracts families seeking top-tier education and a quiet, upscale lifestyle within easy reach of New York City.
highlights: Home to Northern Valley Regional High School at Demarest, a Blue Ribbon school
Quiet, upscale residential community with large lots
Wooded, semi-rural character uncommon in Bergen County
Strong property values driven by school district quality
Close proximity to Closter's dining and shopping

realEstate.assessmentInfo: Properties assessed by the Borough Tax Assessor. Home values are strongly correlated with the high-performing school district.
realEstate.recentTrends: Demarest's market is extremely competitive due to the Northern Valley Demarest high school. Teardown-rebuild is common, with modern colonials replacing older ranch homes. Inventory remains low and prices have risen steadily.
neighborhoodNotes: The area around Northern Valley Regional HS is highly sought after by families
Lots along Knickerbocker Road tend to be larger with mature landscaping
The northern section near Closter border is convenient to Closter's shops
New construction homes command premium prices throughout the borough

trashCollection.title: Trash Collection
trashCollection.description: Curbside trash pickup provided twice weekly by the borough's contracted hauler.
details: Collection days vary by street
Trash in sealed bags or covered containers by 6:00 AM
Maximum weight 50 lbs per container
Bulk pickup by appointment with DPW

recycling.title: Recycling
recycling.description: Weekly recycling collection through the Bergen County Utilities Authority program.
details: Commingled recyclables in blue bins
Paper and cardboard collected separately
No plastic bags or Styrofoam
Seasonal electronics recycling events

waterSewer.title: Water & Sewer
waterSewer.description: Water provided by Veolia Water. Sewer service managed through BCUA.
details: Quarterly water billing from Veolia
Sewer charges included in tax bills
Report water emergencies to DPW
Water quality reports available annually

permits.title: Building Permits
permits.description: All construction, renovation, and zoning permits handled by the Building Department.
details: Permits required for structural work, electrical, plumbing, and HVAC
Teardown-rebuild projects require full site plan approval
Zoning Board reviews variance applications
Certificate of Occupancy required for all new construction

parking.title: Parking
parking.description: Demarest is primarily residential with limited parking regulations.
details: No municipal parking lots or meters
On-street parking generally permitted during daytime
Overnight parking restrictions may apply on some streets
Snow emergency parking bans enforced

additionalServices.title: Leaf Collection
additionalServices.description: Seasonal leaf collection by the DPW in fall months.
details: Curbside leaf pickup October through December
Leaves must be placed in the curb strip (not in bags on the curb)
Multiple passes through the borough during fall season
Check DPW schedule for pickup dates

noise.title: Noise Ordinance
noise.summary: Strict noise regulations preserve the quiet residential character.
keyRules: Construction prohibited before 7:30 AM and after 6:00 PM weekdays
Saturday construction 8:00 AM to 5:00 PM
No construction on Sundays or holidays
Gas-powered leaf blowers restricted seasonally

propertyMaintenance.title: Property Maintenance
propertyMaintenance.summary: Property owners responsible for maintaining their lots to borough standards.
keyRules: Lawns and landscaping must be maintained
Dead or hazardous trees must be removed
Sidewalks kept clear — snow removal within 24 hours
No accumulation of junk or debris

pets.title: Pet Regulations
pets.summary: Standard pet licensing and control requirements.
keyRules: Annual dog license required
Dogs must be leashed off owner's property
Pet waste must be cleaned up immediately
Rabies vaccination required for dogs and cats

parking.title: Parking Regulations
parking.summary: Limited parking regulations given the residential nature of the borough.
keyRules: No parking on streets during snow emergencies
Overnight parking may be restricted on certain roads
Commercial vehicles restricted in residential zones
Parking near schools regulated during school hours

rentals.title: Rental Regulations
rentals.summary: Rental properties must meet borough housing code requirements.
keyRules: Rental registration required
Certificate of Habitability at tenant turnover
Inspections before occupancy
Landlords responsible for property code compliance

other.title: Tree Preservation
other.summary: Demarest has tree removal regulations to maintain its wooded character.
keyRules: Permit required for removal of trees over a certain caliper
Replacement plantings may be required
Shade Tree Commission reviews applications
Penalties for unauthorized removal
other.source: Borough of Demarest Shade Tree Ordinance

publicSchools.name: Northern Valley Regional High School at Demarest
publicSchools.notes: Blue Ribbon School of Excellence. Serves students from Closter, Cresskill, Demarest, Haworth, and Alpine. Known for outstanding academics, STEM programs, and competitive athletics.

privateSchools.name: Alpine Country Day School
privateSchools.notes: Independent school in Demarest with a focus on individualized learning

whyMoveHere: Northern Valley Demarest High School is among NJ's top public high schools
Quiet, semi-rural atmosphere with large, wooded lots
Very safe community with extremely low crime
Close to Closter's dining and shopping while maintaining privacy

commuteToNYC.primaryMethod: NJ Transit bus to GWB Bus Station
commuteToNYC.notes: NJ Transit Route 9A along County Road provides service to the GWB Bus Station. Many residents drive to the GWB (approximately 20 minutes) or use commuter parking in neighboring towns. Some use Closter bus stops.

costOfLiving.summary: Demarest has a high cost of living driven by premium home prices and property taxes, reflecting the borough's top-tier school district.
costOfLiving.vsStateAverage: Well above the NJ average in housing and taxes

pros: Outstanding public high school (Northern Valley Demarest)
Large lots and mature tree canopy
cons: Very high home prices and property taxes
No downtown or commercial center — must drive for shopping
Few dining or entertainment options within the borough

restaurants.name: DeMarest Farms
restaurants.description: Working farm and market open seasonally for strawberry picking, apple picking, homemade ice cream, and pies. A beloved Bergen County institution.

restaurants.name: Bottagra
restaurants.description: Upscale Italian restaurant just over the border in Closter, popular with Demarest residents.

restaurants.name: Harvest Bistro & Bar
restaurants.description: New American cuisine with seasonal menus, located in nearby Closter.

parks.name: Demarest Nature Center / Crescent Field
parks.description: Open space with walking trails, athletic fields, and natural areas popular with families.

parks.name: Memorial Park
parks.description: Borough park with playground, picnic areas, and open green space.

parks.name: Closter Nature Center
parks.description: 135-acre nature preserve just across the border in Closter, popular with Demarest residents for hiking and nature programs.

events.name: Demarest Community Day
events.description: Annual celebration with food, games, and activities for the whole family.

events.name: NV Demarest Homecoming
events.description: Northern Valley Demarest homecoming weekend with football game, parade, and school festivities.

events.name: Memorial Day Ceremony
events.description: Borough observance honoring fallen veterans at Memorial Park.

attractions.name: Northern Valley Regional High School at Demarest
attractions.description: Renowned public high school drawing families from across Bergen County. Features excellent facilities for academics, arts, and athletics.

attractions.name: Demarest Public Library
attractions.description: Community library offering programs, digital resources, and a welcoming space for all ages.

government.meetingSchedule: Borough Council meets on the second and fourth Tuesday of each month at 8:00 PM
government.meetingLocation: Demarest Borough Hall, 118 Serpentine Rd, Demarest, NJ 07627
